title: The Old Kitchen
description: A return to the old-style kitchen sink packs, with some modern accoutrements
body:
The Old Kitchen is a pack that aims to bring back the experiences of classic Minecraft mods such as The Aether, Ender IO, and blood magic, while still experiencing the newer aspect of the modding scene. # Features ### Lots of Magic options - Ars Nouveau - Blood Magic - Botania - and more! ### Nostalgic Industrial mods - Ender IO - Thermal Suite - Mekanism - and more! ### New dimensions to explore - The Aether - Ad Astra - Deeper & Darker - And one secret dimension! ### Exciting curios to find - Artifacts - Majrusz's Accessories - Relics! ## This pack also features a custom-built quest system designed to help the players explore the entire modlist Modlist and Credit:
